notes: Windows version works perfectly out of the box using Proton (Linux native version does not work)
title: DreadOut

cpu: AMD A8-7100 Radeon R5, 8 Compute Cores 4C+4G
notes: The game, although it runs natively, was impossible for me to play due to corrupted savings. With Proton I solved the problem and the game runs very well after setting in the launch options the parameter PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%. I played Act 0 and part of the first act with no issues except for the initial lagging video and the anti-aliasing that doesn't work.
title: DreadOut
